name: ContextSlim Context Window Profiler & Optimizer
description: Clean, well-documented, security-conscious utility that fills a real gap. Local-only design — no external API calls, no data leaves the machine. Pure Python, zero external dependencies. Provides context profiling, compression suggestions, and HTML reports. LIMITATIONS.md shows intellectual honesty.
review: Clean, well-documented, security-conscious utility that fills a real gap. Local-only design — no external API calls, no data leaves the machine. Pure Python, zero external dependencies. Provides context profiling, compression suggestions, and HTML reports. LIMITATIONS.md shows intellectual honesty.
